ddls:
CREATE TABLE "rivers" (
  "rivid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each river */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the river */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the river */,
  "length_km" REAL /* Length of the river in kilometers */,
  "source_location" TEXT /* Coordinates (longitude, latitude) of the river's source */,
  "mouth_location" TEXT /* Coordinates (longitude, latitude) of the river's mouth */,
  "basin_area_sqkm" REAL /* Area of the river basin in square kilometers */,
  "average_flow_rate" REAL /* Average flow rate of the river in cubic meters per second */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rivid")
)

CREATE TABLE "river_geometry" (
  "rivid" INTEGER /* Reference to the river */,
  "area_sqm" INTEGER /* Area of the river in square meters */,
  "lon_index" INTEGER /* Longitude index of the river */,
  "lat_index" INTEGER /* Latitude index of the river */,
  "npoints" INTEGER /* Number of points in the river geometry */,
  "geometry_wkt" TEXT /* Well-Known Text (WKT) representation of the river's geometry */,
  "centroid_lon" REAL /* Longitude of the river's centroid */,
  "centroid_lat" REAL /* Latitude of the river's centroid */,
  "buffer_distance" REAL /* Distance used for creating a buffer around the river for spatial analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rivid")
)

CREATE TABLE "lsm_grids" (
  "grid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each LSM grid */,
  "lsm_grid_lon" REAL /* Longitude of the LSM grid */,
  "lsm_grid_lat" REAL /* Latitude of the LSM grid */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the LSM grid in meters */,
  "slope" REAL /* Slope of the LSM grid in degrees */,
  "aspect" REAL /* Aspect (direction the slope faces) of the LSM grid in degrees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "river_lsm_grids" (
  "rivid" INTEGER /* Reference to the river */,
  "grid_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the LSM grid */,
  "distance_to_river" REAL /* Distance from the LSM grid to the nearest point on the river in meters */,
  "grid_area_sqm" REAL /* Area of the LSM grid in square meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rivid", "grid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_quality" (
  "rivid" INTEGER /* Reference to the river */,
  "water_temp" REAL /* Water temperature */,
  "ph_level" REAL /* pH level */,
  "do_level" REAL /* Dissolved oxygen level */,
  "turbidity" REAL /* Turbidity level of the water in NTU */,
  "total_suspended_solids" REAL /* Total suspended solids in the water in mg/L */,
  "phosphorus_level" REAL /* Phosphorus level in the water in µg/L */,
  "nitrogen_level" REAL /* Nitrogen level in the water in µg/L */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rivid")
)

CREATE TABLE "land_use" (
  "rivid" INTEGER /* Reference to the river */,
  "land_use_type" TEXT /* Type of land use (e.g., forest, urban, agricultural) */,
  "area_sqm" INTEGER /* Area of land use in square meters */,
  "land_cover" TEXT /* Type of land cover (e.g., forest, urban, agricultural) */,
  "land_use_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the total area covered by the land use type */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the land use data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rivid", "land_use_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "rivid" INTEGER /* Reference to the river */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "reading" REAL /* Sensor reading */,
  "reading_date" TEXT /* Date of the sensor reading */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, pH, DO) */,
  "sensor_location" TEXT /* Coordinates (longitude, latitude) of the sensor */,
  "sensor_description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "sensor_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was last calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rivid", "sensor_id", "reading_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "satellite_imagery" (
  "rivid" INTEGER /* Reference to the river */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each satellite image */,
  "image_date" TEXT /* Date of the satellite image */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the satellite image (e.g., GeoTIFF, JPEG) */,
  "image_resolution" REAL /* Resolution of the satellite image in meters per pixel */,
  "image_size" INTEGER /* Size of the satellite image in bytes */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the satellite image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rivid", "image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_rivers" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "rivid" INTEGER /* Reference to the river */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write, admin) the user has for the river */,
  "last_access" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last access to the river data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "rivid")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission")
)

CREATE TABLE "river_versions" (
  "rivid" INTEGER /* Reference to the river */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rivid", "version"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_river_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_quality_versions" (
  "rivid" INTEGER /* Reference to the river */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rivid", "version"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_quality_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "land_use_versions" (
  "rivid" INTEGER /* Reference to the river */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rivid", "version"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_land_use_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data_versions" (
  "rivid" INTEGER /* Reference to the river */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rivid", "version"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "satellite_imagery_versions" (
  "rivid" INTEGER /* Reference to the river */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rivid", "version"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_satellite_imagery_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
